hero.title: Your AI teammate, on your machine
hero.description: Lydia Agent runs locally, remembers context, and handles code, tasks, and creativity without sending your workflow to the cloud.

featurePreview.title: Lives everywhere, remembers everything.
featurePreview.description: From terminal to desktop, Lydia runs tasks, keeps memory, and integrates with your favorite tools.

featuresGrid.title: Built for makers
featuresGrid.subtitle: Each capability is an Astro island: interactive only where it matters.

features.persistentMemoryDesc: Lydia stores facts, preferences, and project context using memory skills and structured notes.
features.webBrowseDesc: Open sites, extract data, interact with forms, and verify results in real time.
features.creativeDesc: Generate ASCII art, diagrams, music, copy, and code with a style of its own.
features.scheduledDesc: Create cron jobs, reminders, and pipelines that keep running while you rest.
features.sandboxDesc: Each subagent works in an isolated context to avoid conflicts and risks.
features.astroIslandsDesc: Selective hydration: animations and interactivity live only where they are needed.
features.cliDesc: Control the entire agent from the terminal with a consistent and fast command set.
features.integrationsDesc: Connect Telegram, Discord, email, smart home, GitHub and more through skills.
features.contextualDesc: Maintains multi-turn context across sessions so answers feel continuous and aware.
features.audioDesc: Text-to-speech, voice memos, music generation and audio analysis out of the box.
features.visualDesc: Generate images, diagrams, ASCII art and polished web artifacts on demand.
features.codeDesc: Write, review, refactor and test code across multiple languages and frameworks.

why.title: Why developers choose Lydia
why.subtitle: Less context switching. More shipped work.

rows.without: Copy-paste prompts between browser and terminal
rows.with: One CLI for chat, code, and automation

rows.without: Lose context every time you restart a session
rows.with: Persistent memory across projects and sessions

rows.without: Pay subscriptions for ten different tools
rows.with: Open source, runs locally, extensible with skills

rows.without: Write glue scripts that break next week

how.title: Get started in three steps
how.subtitle: From install to first task in under a minute.

steps.title: Install
steps.desc: Run the one-line installer for macOS, Windows or Linux.

steps.title: Configure
steps.desc: Point Lydia at your model provider and optional skills.

steps.title: Delegate
steps.desc: Ask, code, automate, or create. Lydia remembers and executes.

testimonials.title: What early users say
testimonials.subtitle: Makers using Lydia to ship faster.

items.quote: I stopped jumping between ChatGPT, my terminal, and Notion. Lydia keeps context and just does the work.
items.author: Alex M.

items.quote: The local-first approach is exactly what I wanted. My code stays on my machine but I still get agent superpowers.
items.author: Sofia R.

items.quote: I set up a cron skill and now Lydia summarizes my RSS feeds every morning. It took five minutes.
items.author: Daniel K.

faq.title: Questions? Answered.
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before installing.

items.a: Yes. Lydia is open source under the MIT license and free to use, modify, and self-host.
The agent core runs on your machine. You choose which model provider to connect; your data never has to leave your system unless you configure external APIs.

items.q: Do I need to know how to code?
items.a: A little. Lydia is built for developers and technical makers who want a programmable assistant.

items.q: Can I add my own skills?
items.a: Absolutely. Skills are plain code and configuration files. Add integrations, cron jobs, memory sources, or custom tools.
Any model reachable via API: OpenAI, Anthropic, local Ollama / llama.cpp, OpenRouter, and more through the gateway.

items.q: How is this different from other agents?
items.a: Lydia is local-first, memory-persistent, and designed to be extended by you, not locked behind a SaaS subscription.
